---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. OS / distro (e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, Fedora 40, macOS 14 Sonoma)
2. Command you ran
3. What happened

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Log file

Please attach or paste the content of your log file:
`~/.setupcraft-<timestamp>.log`

```
paste log here
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Fedora 41]
- Node.js version: [e.g. v22.0.0] (run `node --version`)
- setupcraft version: [e.g. 1.0.0] (run `npx setupcraft --version`)
- Shell: [e.g. bash 5.2, zsh 5.9]
